title: American Leak Detection Contract Extension for Water System Monitoring
summary: Water Department Management Analyst presents extension of contract with American Leak for leak detection across the water distribution system using specialized sensors on conduits, services, and water mains. Council requests cost-benefit analysis quantifying water savings from early leak detection; staff offers to provide annual reports with volume and cost data.

political_signal.description: Council requests quantitative ROI data on leak detection program
